title: Standalone app scaffold
description: Next.js app (port 3017, basePath /risk-library), vendored @platform packages, Dockerfile, docker-compose.app.yml, build.sh. Mirror pss-production-card.
close_reason: Scaffold built + pushed (cb73732); next build passes.

title: embedding-proxy service (Proxmox)
description: POST /embed {texts,role} -> vectors; applies nomic search_query:/search_document: prefix + L2 normalise; forwards to Orin Ollama nomic-embed-text. Internal-only on platform_net.

title: Apply migration 040 to shared Supabase
description: Apply platform-portal/supabase/migrations/040_risk_library.sql to self-hosted Supabase (10.0.0.85). 'create extension vector' may need supabase_admin. Verify HNSW index + match_risk_library RPC. Checkpoint with Steve before applying.
notes: Migration 040 written to platform-portal/supabase/migrations/040_risk_library.sql. Awaiting on-LAN apply (sandbox can't reach 10.0.0.85 on any port). Apply via Studio SQL editor or ssh+supabase_admin.

title: Risk Library PoC
description: Semantic risk library: capture project Risks/Actions/Issues; surface similar past ones during a new project's risk assessment. Spec: docs/DESIGN.md, CONTEXT.md, docs/adr/0001-0003.

title: Assessment lookup UI + /api/risk/search
description: Project-profile query -> embedding-proxy (role=query) -> match_risk_library RPC -> ranked, kind-grouped results (Risks to consider / Issues that hit related jobs).

title: Capture + seeding UI + /api/risk/capture
description: Cause/event/effect capture form + fast seeding mode; capture API embeds on save via embedding-proxy. Open RLS, attributed by created_by.

title: Portal projects card -> /risk-library/
description: Add a card in platform-portal projects area linking to /risk-library/, same pattern as other standalone apps.
